svg.text: Voice-first interactive storytelling · Google Cloud Run · Gemini Live API · Vertex AI
Single service · Cloud Build CI/CD · Docker multi-stage build
Loading cards → loaded images · visual gallery
Shown on awardBadge tool call · child confirmation
Bidirectional audio proxy: Browser ↔ Gemini Live
Injects character system prompt + voice config
Injects opening_text as fake model turn
15 min timeout · forwards tool calls to browser
Flash Lite: story opening + first image (prewarm)
Flash Lite scene extraction → image generation
Flash Lite content safety check → SAFE/UNSAFE
Flash Lite labels prop/sketch → storybook illus.
Gemini 2.0 Flash narrates actual session images
Input: 16kHz PCM audio stream + JPEG camera frames
Output: 24kHz PCM audio stream + output transcription
Aoede · Charon · Kore · Puck · Fenrir · Leda · Orus · Zephyr
Gemini decides when to call (not rate-limited)
Direct to image generation · faster path
Only on explicit child verbal confirmation
Triggers badge popup overlay in frontend
Model inference via Vertex AI · managed runtime
Each image narrated in character voice · 2 sentences
